completed_tasks.name: Fix Kimi User-Agent injection via default_headers
Create KimiChatOpenAI subclass for payload mutations
Unify Kimi model catalog to kimi-for-coding
Debug reasoning_content 400 error for tool-calling assistant messages
completed_tasks.progress: Verified that empty string reasoning_content is sent in HTTP body but still rejected by Kimi API

remaining_tasks.name: Find correct reasoning_content value/structure for Kimi requests
Apply fix and verify end-to-end graph execution

blockers.description: Kimi API rejects assistant tool call messages even when reasoning_content: '' is present in the HTTP request body
blockers.workaround: None yet - need to determine expected field value/structure

decisions.decision: Use default_headers instead of http_client.headers for User-Agent injection
decisions.rationale: openai SDK does not forward http_client.headers to actual requests

decisions.decision: Use KimiChatOpenAI subclass to mutate request payload before serialization
decisions.rationale: Only way to apply provider-specific fix without changing all analyst nodes

next_action: Determine what value/structure Kimi expects for reasoning_content in assistant tool call messages by testing non-empty strings, null, or nested objects
context_notes: The 400 error persists even though the HTTP request body explicitly contains reasoning_content: ''. This means either the field needs a different value type, or there's another structural requirement we're missing. We were in the middle of testing different values via scripts/test_kimi_reasoning_values.py.
